title: NEW ASSISTIVE DEVICE WARRANTIES
doc_html:
CHAPTER 46.  NEW ASSISTIVE DEVICE WARRANTIES

§2761.  New Assistive Devices Warranty Act

This Chapter shall be known as the "New Assistive Devices Warranty Act".

Acts 1993, No. 907, §1, eff. June 23, 1993.
